name: modelflare
description: Automatically surfaces all Cloudflare Workers AI models in VS Code Copilot Chat

scripts.compile: npm run compile:ts && npm run compile-web
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run package-web

modelflare.apiKey.markdownDescription: Your Cloudflare API Key. Consider using VS Code's secret storage for security.

modelflare.gatewayId.description: Your Cloudflare AI Gateway ID (optional). When set, compat requests use this gateway instead of the default gateway.

modelflare.includeGatewaySupportedModels.description: Discover provider-prefixed AI Gateway models from Cloudflare's supported-model catalog and surface them in the Copilot picker.

modelflare.gatewaySupportedModelProvider.description: Optional provider allowlist for AI Gateway discovery. Use provider IDs like openai, anthropic, or google-ai-studio. Leave empty to include all supported providers.

modelflare.manualModels.description: Optional explicit model registrations. Use full handles like @cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast or openai/gpt-5-mini.

task.description: Optional task label. Defaults to a handle-based heuristic.

reasoningEffortLevels.description: Optional supported Think Effort values for this model, such as ["low", "medium", "high"]. When present, VS Code can surface a per-model Think Effort picker.

enumDescriptions: Use Cloudflare's latest-model shortcut for Workers AI discovery.
Use Cloudflare's latest stable-model shortcut for Workers AI discovery.
modelflare.modelFilter.description: Which Cloudflare discovery filter to apply when surfacing models in Copilot Chat.

modelflare.completionModel.description: Optional model handle, name, or id to use for inline completions. When unset, the extension picks a Text Generation model using completion-focused heuristics.

modelflare.reasoningEffort.description: Optional fallback reasoning effort forwarded to reasoning-capable models when no per-model Think Effort selection is available. Leave empty to omit it. Common values include low, medium, and high.

modelflare.completionSystemPrompt.default: You are a precise code completion engine. Return only the completion with no markdown or explanation.
modelflare.completionSystemPrompt.description: Optional system prompt override used for inline completion requests.

modelflare.completionExcludedLanguages.description: Language IDs that should not receive inline completions.

modelflare.capabilityOverrides.description: Map model handles to specific capabilities to override automatic capability detection. Keys should be model handles, values are objects like { "toolCalling": true }.
